system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight   28.96;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp          1004.5;
        Hf          0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu          0;
        Pr          1;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (1.3 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (1.3 0 0);
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      T;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         4;

deltaT          0.002;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.1;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
    reconstruct(p)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Left leg (x=0 to x=0.6)
    (0    0    -0.05)   // 0
    (0.6  0    -0.05)   // 1
    (0.6  0.2  -0.05)   // 2
    (0    0.2  -0.05)   // 3
    (0    0     0.05)   // 4
    (0.6  0     0.05)   // 5
    (0.6  0.2   0.05)   // 6
    (0    0.2   0.05)   // 7
);

blocks
(
    // Block 0: left leg (0 to 0.6, 0 to 0.2)
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (25 8 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 7 3)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (23 24 19 18)
        );
    }
    obstacle
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (2 3 7 6)
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>
<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.rhoCentralFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Cannot find file "points" in directory "polyMesh" in times "0" down to constant

    From function virtual Foam::IOobject Foam::fileOperation::findInstance(const Foam::IOobject&, Foam::scalar, const Foam::word&) const
    in file global/fileOperations/fileOperation/fileOperation.C at line 869.

FOAM exiting'}, {'file': 'log.blockMesh', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Point label 23 out of range 0..7
    on patch top, face 0

file: top from line 63 to line 67.

    From function void Foam::blockMesh::checkPatchLabels(const Source&, const Foam::word&, const Foam::pointField&, Foam::faceList&) const [with Source = Foam::dictionary; Foam::pointField = Foam::Field<Foam::Vector<double> >; Foam::faceList = Foam::List<Foam::face>]
    in file blockMesh/blockMeshTopology.C at line 93.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<review_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

Looking at the current errors:

1. **`log.blockMesh`**: `Point label 23 out of range 0..7` on patch `top`. Face 0 references vertex 23, but the mesh only has 8 vertices (0-7). The `top` patch face `(23 24 19 18)` uses vertices that don't exist in the 8-vertex mesh.

2. **`log.rhoCentralFoam`**: Cascading error â€” no mesh generated because blockMesh failed.

The mesh has been simplified to 8 vertices (only the left leg), but the `top` and `bottom` patches still reference vertices 16-23 which were removed in previous simplifications. The `top` patch face needs to be updated to use only vertices 0-7.

## Resolution

**Update the `blockMeshDict` boundary face definitions to be consistent with the 8-vertex mesh:**

1. **`top` patch**: The current face `(23 24 19 18)` references non-existent vertices. For the left-only leg, the top face should be the back face of the left leg block. The left leg hex is `hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7)`, so its back face is `(2 3 7 6)`. Add this face to the `top` patch. Also check if there are any other external faces on the back/top side. The corrected `top` should be:
   ```
   top
   {
       type symmetryPlane;
       faces
       (
           (2 3 7 6)
       );
   }
   ```

2. **`bottom` patch**: Similarly, the bottom face of the left leg block is `(0 4 7 3)`. Ensure it is:
   ```
   bottom
   {
       type symmetryPlane;
       faces
       (
           (0 4 7 3)
       );
   }
   ```

3. **Verify all other patches** (`inlet`, `outlet`, `obstacle`, `defaultFaces`) continue to use only vertices 0-7. The `obstacle` patch currently has `(2 3 7 6)` and `(1 2 6 5)` â€” these are correct and should remain.

4. **`defaultFaces`**: With only 2 blocks and no internal faces, `type empty;` is appropriate and should remain.

The key fix is replacing the `top` patch face `(23 24 19 18)` with `(2 3 7 6)`, which is the actual back face of the single left-leg block in the 8-vertex mesh. Similarly, verify that `bottom` uses `(0 4 7 3)` as its sole face. After these corrections, blockMesh should succeed and generate a valid polyMesh for rhoCentralFoam to run.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a laminar, compressible flow over a forward-facing step using the rhoCentralFoam solver. Boundary conditions include a fixed velocity of 1.3m/s and temperature of 1 K at the inlet and slip conditions on the obstacle. Use timestep of 0.002 and output every 0.1. Finaltime is 4.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='system/blockMeshDict', changes='Replace top patch face (23 24 19 18) with (2 3 7 6) which is the back face of the left leg block; Keep bottom patch face (0 4 7 3) unchanged as it already uses valid vertices; All other patches use only vertices 0-7 so they remain valid')]
